mapper.select: SELECT satisfaction_id, ticket_id, evaluator_id, score, content, create_time FROM ticket_satisfaction WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
mapper.sql: SELECT s.satisfaction_id, s.ticket_id, t.ticket_no, t.title AS ticket_title, s.evaluator_id, u.nick_name AS evaluator_name, s.score, s.content, s.create_time FROM ticket_satisfaction s INNER JOIN ticket t ON t.ticket_id = s.ticket_id AND t.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = s.evaluator_id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(score), 2), 0) AS average_score, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS one_star_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS two_star_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS three_star_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS four_star_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS five_star_count FROM ticket_satisfaction
AND score = #{score} AND create_time >= #{beginTime} AND create_time <= #{endTime}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_satisfaction (ticket_id, evaluator_id, score, content, create_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{evaluatorId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{createTime})
